title: satureja montana subsp. obovata
intro: Satureja montana subsp. obovata, also known as mountain savory or obovate mountain savory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its carminative and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of mountain savory include reducing inflammation, relieving stress and anxiety, and providing antioxidant properties that protect against cell damage. Mountain savory can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and immune function.
